query: SELECT id, name, customerName FROM engagements WHERE name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%demo%' OR name LIKE '%Demo%' OR name LIKE '%sample%' OR customerName LIKE '%test%' OR customerName LIKE '%Test%' OR customerName LIKE '%Acme%' LIMIT 20;
